# Options
set(LWS_WITH_STATIC ON CACHE BOOL "Build static libwebsockets")
set(LWS_WITH_SHARED OFF CACHE BOOL "Disable shared libwebsockets")
set(LWS_WITHOUT_TESTAPPS ON CACHE BOOL "Disable test apps")


# Variables


# Find Packages


# Sub Directories
add_subdirectory(libwebsockets)


# Executables


# Include Directories


# Libraries
